summary: Inventory Access Control System Testing Complete - All features working. Backend APIs (19/19 tests passed). Frontend Access Type Modal, Inventory Login flow, Inventory User Dashboard, and Admin Inventory Team Performance panel all working correctly. Fixed minor bug where user name showed as 'undefined' in header.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: User name showing as 'undefined' in header - InventoryLoginModal was passing API response data instead of stored session data to onSessionStarted callback
Access Type Modal correctly appears after admin login
Admin key '0219' and Inventory key 'inventory2024' verification working correctly
Inventory Mode correctly restricts access to only 3 tabs: My Dashboard, Inventory, Property Analytics
Session tracking with points system (1 property = 1 point) implemented correctly
Performance status logic (<30 = Needs Attention, >=30 = Good Performance) working
seed_data_creation: Multiple inventory sessions created during testing for user 'Rahul Sharma' and 'Priya Patel'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Access Control System is fully functional. All backend APIs work correctly. Frontend modals and dashboards working. Access type selection, key verification, inventory login flow, user dashboard with stats, and admin inventory team performance panel all tested and working.

Backend_verify_admin_key.details: Admin key '0219' verification grants full access

Backend_verify_inventory_key.details: Inventory key 'inventory2024' verification grants restricted access

Backend_predefined_users.details: Returns list of 10 predefined inventory users

Backend_available_cities.details: Returns list of available cities for work plan

Backend_inventory_login.details: Creates inventory session with user name, cities, targets

Backend_inventory_logout.details: Ends session, calculates active minutes and performance status

Backend_my_inventory_stats.details: Returns session stats including properties added, points, achievement percentage

Backend_admin_inventory_team.details: Returns all inventory sessions with summary stats for admin

Backend_admin_inventory_user_detail.details: Returns detailed session info including photo

Backend_admin_update_inventory_key.details: Allows admin to update inventory access key

Frontend_Access_Type_Modal.details: Shows Admin Access and Inventory Access options after login

Frontend_Admin_Key_Verification.details: Verifies admin key '0219' and grants full access

Frontend_Inventory_Key_Verification.details: Verifies inventory key 'inventory2024' and shows inventory login modal

Frontend_Inventory_Login_Modal.details: 3-step flow: User selection, Photo capture (optional), Work plan (cities & targets)

Frontend_Inventory_User_Dashboard.details: Shows stats (Added Today, Target, Points Earned, Cities), Target Progress, City-wise Breakdown, End Session button

Frontend_Inventory_Restricted_Tabs.details: Inventory mode shows only 3 tabs: My Dashboard, Inventory, Property Analytics

Frontend_Admin_Inventory_Team_Panel.details: Shows Daily Tracking, Performance, Settings tabs with session data

bug_fixed.issue: User name showing as 'undefined' in header when in Inventory Mode
bug_fixed.root_cause: InventoryLoginModal.jsx was passing API response data to onSessionStarted callback instead of the stored session data which includes user_name
bug_fixed.fix: Changed onSessionStarted(data) to onSessionStarted(sessionData) where sessionData includes user_name from selectedUser

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - inventory session data stored in MongoDB collection: inventory_sessions

screenshots: .screenshots/01_after_login.png - Access Type Modal after admin login
.screenshots/04_admin_dashboard.png - Full admin dashboard with all tabs
.screenshots/14_inventory_user_name_fix.png - User name displayed correctly after fix
